name: DISCOVER
interviewSummary: No live owner interview available this session. Business identity re-discovered from public web sources (Yelp business + menu pages, KHAK local news article, delivery aggregators). Captains Fish and Chicken is a counter-service soul-food restaurant specializing in fried fish, chicken, and seafood made fresh to order, at 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA. Owner Ray Aqel opened it in late October 2024 as his first Iowa location (the same concept was previously run in Minnesota, Illinois, and Michigan). A second Cedar Rapids location at 3100 6th St SW exists but is out of scope for this site.

businessIdentity.name: Captains Fish and Chicken
businessIdentity.category: Soul food / fried fish, chicken and seafood (counter service)
businessIdentity.positioning: Fresh-to-order fried seafood and chicken; generous portions and family/party deals; a newer independent spot with strong early word-of-mouth on catfish, wings, tenders, shrimp and cheese curds.
